typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	Dept10 as integer (),
	Dept20 as integer (),
	RS_DEPT10 as string ()
}

source(output(
		Deptno as integer,
		Dname as string,
		LOC as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false) ~> IFILDept	source(output(
		EMPNO as string,
		ENAME as string,
		JOB as string,
		MGR as string,
		HIREDATE as date,
		SAL as integer,
		COMM as string,
		DEPT_NO as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false) ~> IFILEmp	source(output(
		DeptId as integer,
		FirstName as string,
		LastName as string,
		MgrId as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select * from dbo.Manager',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LKPManagerLKPTABLE
IFILDept sort(asc(Deptno, false)) ~> SRTDeptno
IFILEmp sort(asc(DEPT_NO, false)) ~> SRTDeptno0
SRTDeptno,SRTDeptno0 join(Deptno == DEPT_NO,
	joinType:'inner',
	broadcast: 'none')~> MERGEJOINDeptno
MERGEJOINDeptno derive(Deptno = Deptno,
		Dname = Dname,
		LOC = LOC,
		EMPNO = EMPNO,
		ENAME = ENAME,
		JOB = JOB,
		MGR = MGR,
		HIREDATE = HIREDATE,
		SAL = SAL,
		COMM = COMM,
		DEPT_NO = DEPT_NO) ~> MERGEJOINDeptnoREFORMAT1
MERGEJOINDeptnoREFORMAT1 derive(Store = 'New York Hub',
		CurrentDate = currentDate(),
		Name = trim(EMPNO) + '-' + trim(ENAME),
		Location = iifNull(LOC,'Chicago'),
		Loc_Short = substring(toString(LOC), toInteger(1), toInteger(3)),
		MGRID = trim(MGR)) ~> TRNSFRM
TRNSFRM,LKPManagerLKPTABLE lookup(Deptno == DeptId,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> LKPManager
TRNSFRM sort(asc(EMPNO, false)) ~> SRTEmpno
TRNSFRM derive(Dept_Mgr = Dname + ' ' + MGR,
		FindStr = locate('abc', Dname, 1)) ~> TRNSFRMDeptMgr
LKPManager split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LKPManagerIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
TRNSFRMDeptMgr,SRTEmpno union(byName: true) ~> UNIONALL
UNIONALL sink(input(
		{} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false) ~> OFILDeptTgt
LKPManagerIsMatch@Match split(DEPT_NO == 10,DEPT_NO == 20, disjoint: true) ~> CONDITIONALSPLIT@(Dept10,Dept20,ConditionalSplitDefaultOutput)
CONDITIONALSPLIT@Dept10 sink(input(
		{} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	mapColumn(
		{})) ~> OutputPlaceHolderRSDEPT10
CONDITIONALSPLIT@Dept20 sink(input(
		LOC as string,
		DEPTNO as integer,
		DNAME as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		LOC,
		DEPTNO = Deptno,
		DNAME = Dname)) ~> Dept20
